claim: Migraine with aura is associated with ischemic stroke.
evidence_sentences: Additional analyses indicated a significantly higher risk among people who had migraine with aura (2.16, 1.53 to 3.03) compared with people who had migraine without aura (1.23, 0.90 to 1.69; meta-regression for aura status P=0.02).
CONCLUSION Migraine is associated with a twofold increased risk of ischaemic stroke, which is only apparent among people who have migraine with aura.

conditions: risk ratio 2.16 (1.53 to 3.03) for migraine with aura
risk ratio 1.23 (0.90 to 1.69) for migraine without aura
